mapper.select: SELECT dsr.id, dsr.drug_id, d.drug_name, dsr.record_type, dsr.quantity, dsr.before_stock, dsr.after_stock, dsr.operator_id, e.realname AS operator_name, dsr.related_prescription_id, dsr.reason, dsr.create_time FROM drug_stock_record dsr LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON dsr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON dsr.operator_id = e.id WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE 'Extended%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE 'User Logic%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE '%项目验收%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE '%验收%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_name, '') NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_code, '') NOT LIKE 'EXT-%' AND COALESCE(d.drug_code, '') NOT LIKE 'ULA-%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%User Logic%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%Extended%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%项目验收%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%验收%' AND COALESCE(d.manufacturer, '') NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%User Logic%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%Extended%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%项目验收%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%验收%' AND COALESCE(e.realname, '') NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%User Logic%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%Extended%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%项目验收%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%验收%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%acceptance%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%purchase%' AND COALESCE(dsr.reason, '') NOT LIKE '%monthly check%' AND dsr.drug_id = #{drugId} AND dsr.record_type = #{recordType} ORDER BY dsr.create_time DESC, dsr.id DESC
